Interface Statement

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ConstructorReference, ExpressionStatement, LoopInitializer, MethodOrConstructorReference, ProgramConstruct
All Known Implementing Classes:
ArrayLength, ArrayPostDecl, Assert, Assignment, BinaryAndAssignment, BinaryOrAssignment, BinaryXOrAssignment, BranchStatement, Break, CatchAllStatement, ClassDeclaration, ConstructorCall, ContextStatementBlock, Continue, CopyAssignment, CreateObject, DivideAssignment, Do, DoBreak, EmptyStatement, EnhancedFor, EnhancedForElimination, EnumClassDeclaration, EvaluateArgs, Exec, ExpandMethodBody, ExpressionJumpStatement, For, ForInitUnfoldTransformer, ForToWhile, If, InitArray, InitArrayCreation, IsStatic, JavaStatement, JmlAssert, JumpStatement, LabeledStatement, LabelJumpStatement, LocalVariableDeclaration, LoopScopeBlock, LoopStatement, MergePointStatement, MethodBodyStatement, MethodCall, MethodFrame, MethodReference, MinusAssignment, ModuloAssignment, MultipleVarDecl, New, ParenthesizedExpression, PassiveExpression, PlusAssignment, PostDecrement, PostIncrement, PostWork, PreDecrement, PreIncrement, ProgramSV, ProgramTransformer, ReattachLoopInvariant, Return, SetStatement, ShiftLeftAssignment, ShiftRightAssignment, SpecialConstructorCall, SpecialConstructorReference, StatementBlock, StaticInitialisation, SuperConstructorReference, Switch, SwitchToIf, SynchronizedBlock, ThisConstructorReference, Throw, TimesAssignment, TransactionStatement, Try, TypeOf, Unpack, UnsignedShiftRightAssignment, UnwindLoop, While
public interface Statement extends ProgramElement
Statement. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
